insights.insight: Technical performance and reliability are critical for maintaining user trust and satisfaction, especially during high-traffic periods.
supporting_problems: Slow performance and lag during trading, especially during peak hours.
Trading charts and technical analysis tools are problematic and unreliable.
evidence: There is a lot of lag and the refresh is not as fast as other apps. In the dashboard, the app needs to show the up and down figurewise also, not just percentage wise.

On the listing day, the stock was not visible on the Groww app for around 10 minutes after it went live on the exchange. During the same time, it was available for trading on other brokerage platforms.
insights.implication: The product must prioritize optimizing performance and ensuring reliable data availability during peak times.
insights.hypothesis: If we implement real-time data streaming and optimize server load balancing, we will see a significant reduction in lag and improve user satisfaction.
insights.recommended_action: Conduct a performance audit and implement real-time data streaming solutions.

insights.insight: User experience is heavily impacted by the reliability and responsiveness of payment and withdrawal processes.
supporting_problems: Payment and withdrawal processes are unreliable and cause frustration.
Customer support is unresponsive and difficult to reach.
evidence: Issues with payment and withdrawal processes
The help and support section has an option of 'raise a ticket', which doesn't lead to anywhere. That button is unresponsive.
insights.implication: Improving the reliability of payment and withdrawal processes and enhancing customer support are essential for retaining users.
insights.hypothesis: If we streamline the payment and withdrawal processes and provide a more responsive customer support system, user complaints will decrease and retention rates will improve.
insights.recommended_action: Revamp the payment and withdrawal system and implement a more robust customer support platform.

insights.insight: Data integrity and normalization are crucial for accurate financial analysis and user trust.
supporting_problems: Noise in revenue strings (e.g., '$', '+') causes normalization issues in data processing.
Compliance concerns regarding specific labeling ('Hidden Plateau') that could be construed as investment advice.
evidence: Noise in revenue strings (e.g., '$', '+') causing normalization issues.
Compliance issue with using 'Hidden Plateau' as a label, as it could imply explicit Buy or Sell advice.
insights.implication: The product must ensure data is clean and compliant to avoid user confusion and legal issues.
insights.hypothesis: If we implement a robust data cleaning and compliance review process, we will reduce errors and enhance user trust.
insights.recommended_action: Develop and deploy a comprehensive data cleaning and compliance review system.

insights.insight: Proactive management of compliance risks is essential to avoid legal and reputational damage.
supporting_problems: Compliance concerns regarding specific labeling ('Hidden Plateau') that could be construed as investment advice.
Legal hurdles for utilizing Hierarchy Decision Maker metadata.
evidence: Compliance issue with using 'Hidden Plateau' as a label, as it could imply explicit Buy or Sell advice.
Cleared legal hurdles for utilizing Hierarchy Decision Maker metadata.
insights.implication: The product must continuously monitor and address compliance issues to maintain legal and regulatory adherence.
insights.hypothesis: If we establish a dedicated compliance team to regularly review and update our practices, we will minimize legal risks and enhance user trust.
insights.recommended_action: Form a dedicated compliance team to regularly review and update compliance practices.
